title: Forgotten Relics
description: A mod that adds old forgotten relics from long ago
body:
Awaken the powers from a forgotten time by using old relics!

Find stone tables or relics to get started. Of course, you will need to power these stone tables using colorful gems that can be found deep underground.

Just make sure that these gems don't get struck by lightning! You can also make "Powered" variants of the relics... Just don't use them back to back, that could end very badly
